message:
feat(ufunc): add r_/c_ concat helpers, GridSpec enum, mgrid_spec/ogrid_spec

Add NumPy-parity array concatenation helpers and grid creation with
dual-mode support:

- `r_(&[...])`: row-wise concatenation (np.r_ equivalent) — flattens
  scalars to 1-D, falls back to vstack for higher-dim inputs.
- `c_(&[...])`: column-wise concatenation (np.c_ equivalent) — promotes
  1-D arrays to (N,1) column vectors before axis-1 concat.
- `GridSpec` enum with `Arange` (exclusive stop, step-based) and
  `Linspace` (inclusive endpoints, count-based) variants, matching
  NumPy's mgrid/ogrid dual slice semantics.
- `mgrid_spec` / `ogrid_spec`: full-parity grid builders accepting
  GridSpec slices; existing `mgrid`/`ogrid` now delegate through them.
- Empty-axis handling in mgrid_spec (zero-element output shape).

10 r_/c_ tests + 17 GridSpec/mgrid_spec/ogrid_spec tests = 27 new tests.
Test count updated from 2,594 → 2,638 across README, FEATURE_PARITY,
and crate architecture diagram.  Beads issue tracker updated (3 new
issues, 1 closed).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
